---
name: Handbook chapter contribution / issue
about: Contribute to or report an issue in a handbook chapter
title: "[HANDBOOK] "
labels: ["handbook"]
---

## Chapter

*Which chapter? e.g. `handbook/L05-knowledge-and-retrieval.md`.*

## What is missing or wrong

*Describe the gap or issue.*

## Section of the chapter template affected

- [ ] Purpose / Problem statement / Why this layer exists
- [ ] Responsibilities
- [ ] Architecture / Components
- [ ] Patterns / Anti-patterns / Design alternatives / Trade-offs
- [ ] Cloud implementations (Azure / AWS / GCP / OSS)
- [ ] Failure modes
- [ ] Verification strategy
- [ ] Observability / Performance / Security
- [ ] Production checklist
- [ ] References

## Neutrality check

- [ ] Content is vendor-neutral or belongs in a Cloud Implementation subsection.
- [ ] At least two implementations named for cloud-specific material.

## References

*Standards, papers, prior art.*
